mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( (#{productType} = 'DEPOSIT' AND deposit_product_id = #{productId}) OR (#{productType} = 'SAVING' AND saving_product_id = #{productId}) OR (#{productType} = 'CARD' AND card_product_id = #{productId}) )
mapper.select: SELECT favorite_id AS favoriteId, user_id AS userId, deposit_product_id AS depositProductId, saving_product_id AS savingProductId, card_product_id AS cardProductId, created_time AS createdTime, last_modified_time AS lastModifiedTime FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT dp.kor_co_nm AS bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS product_name, dp.etc_note AS etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2 FROM user_favorites uf JOIN deposit_product dp ON uf.deposit_product_id = dp.deposit_product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm AS max_save_trm, intr_rate AS max_intr_rate, intr_rate2 AS max_intr_rate2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, save_trm DESC ) AS rn FROM deposit_option ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 ) opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 2 ) AS random_deposit

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS id, sp.kor_co_nm AS company, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS title, opt.intr_rate AS base_rate, opt.intr_rate2 AS max_rate, opt.save_trm AS period, sp.max_limit AS amount, fc.company_image AS company_image, TRUE AS is_starred FROM user_favorites uf JOIN saving_product sp ON uf.saving_product_id = sp.saving_product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 WHEN save_trm = 6 THEN 2 WHEN save_trm = 1 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ) AS rn FROM saving_option ) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) opt ON sp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON sp.kor_co_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', fc.kor_co_nm, '%') WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 2 ) AS random_saving

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.card_product_id AS id, c.name AS name, c.type AS type, c.card_image_url AS imageUrl, c.issuer_id AS issuer, c.annual_fee AS annualFee, c.pre_month_money AS preMonthMoney FROM user_favorites uf JOIN card_product c ON uf.card_product_id = c.card_product_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 2 ) AS random_card
SELECT user_id AS userId, nickname AS nickname, email AS email,
SELECT name_ko AS nameKo, quote AS quote, image_url AS imageUrl FROM persona_types WHERE persona_id = ( SELECT persona_id FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
